reviews.comment:
Hay aire para neumáticos, agua para mate, confitería/multiventas, muchos vehículos en época turística.

(Translated by Google)
There is air for tires, water for mate, a confectionery/multi-vendor, and many vehicles during tourist season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRdDh5SWJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
El lugar es lindo, tiene juegos, terraza, buena atención. No tarda en llegar la comida, las papas fritas no son caseras; los ravioles muy simples y no estaban muy ricos, con mucha agua y algunos pedacitos de fideos (como que los hirvieron en la misma agua). Precios muy elevados con respecto a la baja calidad de la comida.

(Translated by Google)
The place is nice, with a playground, a terrace, and good service. The food arrives quickly, but the fries aren't homemade; the ravioli is very plain and not very tasty, with a lot of water and some bits of noodles (like they were boiled in the same water). The prices are very high for the low quality of the food.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNndE9HRW93RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para comer si estás de paso por Zapala. El menú a la carta es muy variado y el servico es excelente.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to eat if you're passing through Zapala. The à la carte menu is very varied and the service is excellent.

reviews.comment:
Filas eternas para cargar combustible. Su bar/cafetería la más cara en 400 kms a la redonda. Si bien los empleados son muy atentos no es responsabilidad de ellos compensar esas falencias

(Translated by Google)
Endless lines for fuel. Their bar/cafeteria is the most expensive for 400 km around. While the employees are very attentive, it's not their responsibility to compensate for these shortcomings.
